text: Hello, can you hear me? I'm Ethan from Nova Health Care, Texas. The reason I'm reaching out to you is to let you know about a cashback benefit to help out-of-pocket costs of up to $10,000, especially when you're in a hospital. To make sure you qualify for this, please confirm with a yes or no if you are under the age of 65. I'm not sure.
